name: HR_DOR_MASS_REQUESTS
description: This table contains information about the mass requests of the document records.

columns.Name: MASS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Uniquely identifies a mass request

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: An unique indentifier for the corresponding ESS request

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_TIME
columns.Comments: The time at which the request is submitted.

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: The time at which the submitted request is started.

columns.Name: COMPLETED_TIME
columns.Comments: The time at which the submitted request is completed.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Mass rquest's status like Pending , Completed, Errored etc.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: User-entered comments about this mass request.

columns.Name: SOURCE_SYSTEM
columns.Comments: The source system or applications instance which is the source of the collected data.

columns.Name: SOURCE_SYSTEM_ID
columns.Comments: An unique indentifier for the system or applications instance which is the source of the collected data.

columns.Name: RETRIED
columns.Comments: Number of retry attempts for the job.

columns.Name: ERROR_MESSAGE
columns.Comments: Brief description of the error encountered during job execution.

columns.Name: ERROR_DETAILS
columns.Comments: Detailed information about the error, including stack trace or diagnostic data.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
